name: brainstormer-codex
description: Read shared content and organize one approved Brainstormer session in Codex through the Brainstormer MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read shared content, create notes, and organize one approved session.
interface.longDescription: Brainstormer Codex connects Codex to one OAuth-approved Brainstormer session. Codex can inspect shared session content, create new root notes/nodes, and use approved tools for standalone tasks, Task Groups, shared Kanban boards, and custom timeline events. Private Spaces and their linked tasks are never included.
defaultPrompt: Turn the previous answer into separate Brainstormer nodes.
Help me create or update Brainstormer tasks.
